     6→  buildLocalePrefixedPath,
     7→  HREFLANG_BY_LOCALE,
     8→  stripLocaleFromPathname,
     9→} from '~/lib/seo/hreflang'
    10→
    11→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    12→export const revalidate = 3600 // 1 hour
    13→export const GET = async (
    14→  _req: Request,
    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ locale: string }> },
    16→) => {
    17→  const { locale } = await params
    18→  const queryClient = getQueryClient()
    19→
    20→  const { data } = await queryClient.fetchQuery({
    21→    queryKey: ['sitemap', locale],
    22→    queryFn: async () => {
    23→      const path = apiClient.aggregate.proxy.sitemap.toString(true)
    24→      return fetch(path).then((res) => res.json())
    25→    },
    26→  })
    27→
    28→  const buildAlternateLinksForPostOrNote = (rawUrl: string) => {
    29→    let url: URL
    30→    try {
    31→      url = new URL(rawUrl)
    32→    } catch {
    33→      return ''
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    const basePath = stripLocaleFromPathname(url.pathname)
    37→    const parts = basePath.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    38→    const isPost = parts[0] === 'posts' && parts.length >= 3
    39→    const isNote = parts[0] === 'notes' && parts.length >= 2
    40→    if (!isPost && !isNote) return ''
    41→
    42→    const { origin } = url
    43→
    44→    const links = locales
    45→      .map((loc) => {
    46→        const hrefLang = HREFLANG_BY_LOCALE[loc]
    47→        const href = `${origin}${buildLocalePrefixedPath(loc, basePath)}`
    48→        return `  <xhtml:link rel="alternate" hreflang="${escapeXml(
    49→          hrefLang,
    50→        )}" href="${escapeXml(href)}" />`
    51→      })
    52→      .join('\n')
    53→
    54→    const xDefaultHref = `${origin}${basePath}`
    55→    const xDefault = `  <xhtml:link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="${escapeXml(
    56→      xDefaultHref,
    57→    )}" />`
    58→
    59→    return `${links}\n${xDefault}`
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  const xml = `
    63→  <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
    64→  <urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9" xmlns:news="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-news/0.9" xmlns:xhtml="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:image="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-image/1.1" xmlns:video="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-video/1.1">
    65→  ${data
    66→    .map((item: any) => {
    67→      const loc = escapeXml(String(item.url ?? ''))
    68→      const lastmod = item.published_at
    69→        ? escapeXml(String(item.published_at))
    70→        : ''
    71→      const alternates = item.url
    72→        ? buildAlternateLinksForPostOrNote(String(item.url))
    73→        : ''
    74→
    75→      return `<url>
    76→  <loc>${loc}</loc>
    77→${lastmod ? `  <lastmod>${lastmod}</lastmod>` : ''}
    78→  <changefreq>daily</changefreq>
    79→${alternates ? `${alternates}\n` : ''}</url>`
    80→    })
    81→    .join('')}
    82→  </urlset>
    83→  `.trim()
    84→  return new Response(xml, {
    85→    headers: {
    86→      'Content-Type': 'application/xml',
    87→    },
    88→  })
    89→}
    90→
```

     1→import { RequestError } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import type { FetchError } from 'ofetch'
     3→
     4→export const getErrorMessageFromRequestError = (error: RequestError) => {
     5→  if (!(error instanceof RequestError)) return (error as Error).message
     6→  const fetchError = error.raw as FetchError
     7→  const messagesOrMessage = fetchError.response?._data?.message
     8→  const bizMessage =
     9→    typeof messagesOrMessage === 'string'
    10→      ? messagesOrMessage
    11→      : Array.isArray(messagesOrMessage)
    12→        ? messagesOrMessage[0]
    13→        : undefined
    14→
    15→  return bizMessage || fetchError.message
    16→}
    17→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import 'server-only'
     2→
     3→import { cookies, headers as nextHeaders } from 'next/headers'
     4→import { createFetch } from 'ofetch'
     5→
     6→import PKG from '~/../package.json'
     7→import { REQUEST_LOCALE } from '~/constants/system'
     8→
     9→import { createApiClient, createFetchAdapter } from './shared'
    10→
    11→const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
    12→
    13→export const $fetch = createFetch({
    14→  defaults: {
    15→    timeout: 8000,
    16→    credentials: 'include',
    17→    async onRequest(context) {
    18→      const cookie = await cookies()
    19→      let headers: any = context.options.headers
    20→      if (headers && headers instanceof Headers) {
    21→        headers = Object.fromEntries(headers.entries())
    22→      } else {
    23→        headers = {}
    24→      }
    25→
    26→      const cookieHeader = cookie
    27→        .getAll()
    28→        .map((c) => `${c.name}=${c.value}`)
    29→        .join('; ')
    30→      if (cookieHeader) {
    31→        headers['cookie'] = cookieHeader
    32→        context.options.cache = 'no-store'
    33→      }
    34→
    35→      context.options.params ??= {}
    36→
    37→      if (isDev) {
    38→        console.info(`[Request/Server]: ${context.request}`)
    39→      }
    40→
    41→      const { get } = await nextHeaders()
    42→
    43→      const ua = get('user-agent')
    44→      const ip =
    45→        get('x-real-ip') ||
    46→        get('x-forwarded-for') ||
    47→        get('remote-addr') ||
    48→        get('cf-connecting-ip')
    49→
    50→      if (ip) {
    51→        headers['x-real-ip'] = ip
    52→        headers['x-forwarded-for'] = ip
    53→      }
    54→
    55→      headers['User-Agent'] =
    56→        `${ua} NextJS/v${PKG.dependencies.next} ${PKG.name}/${PKG.version}`
    57→
    58→      // Prefer an explicit per-request locale, then fall back to the locale
    59→      // normalized by proxy.ts from the incoming request.
    60→      const referer = get('referer') || get('x-invoke-path')
    61→      const explicitLocale = headers['x-lang'] || headers['X-Lang']
    62→      const locale = explicitLocale || get(REQUEST_LOCALE)
    63→
    64→      if (isDev) {
    65→        console.log('locale extracted:', locale, 'from referer:', referer)
    66→      }
    67→
    68→      if (locale) {
    69→        headers['x-lang'] = locale
    70→      }
    71→
    72→      context.options.headers = headers
    73→    },
    74→    onResponse(context) {
    75→      if (isDev) {
    76→        console.info(
    77→          `[Response/Server]: ${context.request}`,
    78→          context.response.status,
    79→        )
    80→      }
    81→    },
    82→  },
    83→})
    84→export const apiClient = createApiClient(createFetchAdapter($fetch))
    85→
    86→const Noop = () => null
    87→export const attachFetchHeader = () => Noop
    88→
    89→export const setGlobalSearchParams = Noop
    90→export const clearGlobalSearchParams = Noop
    91→
    92→export const isReactServer = true
    93→
```

    10→): IRequestAdapter<typeof $fetch> => ({
    11→  default: $fetch,
    12→  get(url: string, options) {

    23→      method: 'post',

    25→      body: data,

    27→    })

    54→    })
    55→  },
    56→})
    57→export const createApiClient = (

     1→import { simpleCamelcaseKeys } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     3→import { nanoid } from 'nanoid'
     4→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { fetchAppUrl } from '~/atoms'
     7→import { setIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     8→import { setSessionReader } from '~/atoms/hooks/reader'
     9→import type { authClient } from '~/lib/authjs'
    10→import { getOpenPanel } from '~/lib/openpanel'
    11→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    12→
    13→type AdapterUser = typeof authClient.$Infer.Session
    14→export const AuthSessionProvider: Component = ({ children }) => {
    15→  const { data: session } = useQuery({
    16→    queryKey: ['session'],
    17→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
    18→    queryFn: () =>
    19→      apiClient.proxy.auth.session.get<AdapterUser>({
    20→        params: {
    21→          r: nanoid(),
    22→        },
    23→      }),
    24→  })
    25→  useEffect(() => {
    26→    if (!session) {
    27→      setIsOwnerLogged(false)
    28→      setSessionReader(null)
    29→      return
    30→    }
    31→    const transformedData = simpleCamelcaseKeys(session)
    32→
    33→    setSessionReader(transformedData)
    34→    if (transformedData.role === 'owner') {
    35→      setIsOwnerLogged(true)
    36→      fetchAppUrl()
    37→    }
    38→    const op = getOpenPanel()
    39→    if (op) {
    40→      op.identify({
    41→        profileId: transformedData.id,
    42→        email: transformedData.email,
    43→        lastName: transformedData.name,
    44→        avatar: transformedData.avatar,
    45→      })
    46→    }
    47→  }, [session])
    48→  return children
    49→}
    50→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 11:27:23Z)**_

二问皆明。

**问题一：`Invalid base URL: /auth`**

`src/lib/authjs.ts:6` — `baseURL: \`${API_URL}/auth\``。dev 下若 `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` 未设，`API_URL` 为 `''`，致 `baseURL` 为 `/auth`，`better-auth` 不受相对路径。

**问题二：`[GET] "/options/url": 404`**

`src/atoms/url.ts:20` — `apiClient.proxy.options.url.get()` 请求 `/options/url`。mx-core 无此 endpoint。URL 配置仅通过 aggregate endpoint 返回（`/aggregate` 中含 `url.webUrl`）。

---

君欲修之乎？若修，方案如下：

1. **authjs.ts**：加判空，`API_URL` 为空时以 `window.location.origin` 为 fallback，或直接用绝对 URL。
2. **url.ts**：改 `fetchAppUrl` 从 aggregate 数据取 `webUrl`/`adminUrl`，或新建 mx-core endpoint。

---

_**User (2026-03-15 11:30:02Z)**_

可以，/options/url 这个接口我说啥时候删掉的

     3→import { nanoid } from 'nanoid'
     4→import { useEffect } from 'react'

     8→import type { authClient } from '~/lib/authjs'
     9→import { getOpenPanel } from '~/lib/openpanel'
    10→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    11→
    12→type AdapterUser = typeof authClient.$Infer.Session
    13→export const AuthSessionProvider: Component = ({ children }) => {
    14→  const { data: session } = useQuery({
    15→    queryKey: ['session'],
    16→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
    17→    queryFn: () =>
    18→      apiClient.proxy.auth.session.get<AdapterUser>({
    19→        params: {
    20→          r: nanoid(),
    21→        },
    22→      }),
    23→  })
    24→  useEffect(() => {
    25→    if (!session) {
    26→      setIsOwnerLogged(false)
    27→      setSessionReader(null)
    28→      return
    29→    }
    30→    const transformedData = simpleCamelcaseKeys(session)
    31→
    32→    setSessionReader(transformedData)
    33→    if (transformedData.role === 'owner') {
    34→      setIsOwnerLogged(true)
    35→    }
    36→    const op = getOpenPanel()
    37→    if (op) {
    38→      op.identify({
    39→        profileId: transformedData.id,
    40→        email: transformedData.email,
    41→        lastName: transformedData.name,
    42→        avatar: transformedData.avatar,
    43→      })
    44→    }
    45→  }, [session])
    46→  return children
    47→}
    48→
```

     1→import { geolocation, ipAddress } from '@vercel/functions'
     2→import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
     3→import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
     4→import createIntlMiddleware from 'next-intl/middleware'
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  REQUEST_GEO,
     8→  REQUEST_HOST,
     9→  REQUEST_IP,
    10→  REQUEST_LOCALE,
    11→  REQUEST_PATHNAME,
    12→  REQUEST_QUERY,
    13→} from './constants/system'
    14→import { defaultLocale, locales } from './i18n/config'
    15→import {
    16→  applyIntlRequestHeaders,
    17→  copyIntlResponseHeaders,
    18→} from './i18n/proxy-headers'
    19→import { routing } from './i18n/routing'
    20→
    21→const intlMiddleware = createIntlMiddleware(routing)
    22→const NEXT_INTL_LOCALE_HEADER = 'X-NEXT-INTL-LOCALE'
    23→
    24→// Check if a string looks like a locale code (2-3 lowercase letters)
    25→const localePattern = /^[a-z]{2,3}$/
    26→
    27→function isUnsupportedLocale(segment: string): boolean {
    28→  return localePattern.test(segment) && !locales.includes(segment as any)
    29→}
    30→
    31→function normalizeLocale(input?: string | null): string | undefined {
    32→  if (!input) return undefined
    33→  const locale = input.toLowerCase()
    34→  const base = locale.split('-')[0]
    35→  if (base && locales.includes(base as any)) return base
    36→  return undefined
    37→}
    38→
    39→function getLocaleFromPathname(pathname: string): string | undefined {
    40→  const firstSegment = pathname.split('/').find((segment) => segment.length > 0)
    41→  return normalizeLocale(firstSegment)
    42→}
    43→
    44→function getLocaleFromRequest(req: NextRequest, pathname: string): string {
    45→  return (
    46→    getLocaleFromPathname(pathname) ||
    47→    normalizeLocale(req.headers.get(NEXT_INTL_LOCALE_HEADER)) ||
    48→    normalizeLocale(req.cookies.get('NEXT_LOCALE')?.value) ||
    49→    (() => {
    50→      const acceptLanguage = req.headers.get('accept-language')
    51→      if (!acceptLanguage) return
    52→      // e.g. "ja,en-US;q=0.9,en;q=0.8"
    53→      const tags = acceptLanguage
    54→        .split(',')
    55→        .map((part) => part.trim().split(';')[0])
    56→        .filter(Boolean)
    57→      for (const tag of tags) {
    58→        const normalized = normalizeLocale(tag)
    59→        if (normalized) return normalized
    60→      }
    61→      return
    62→    })() ||
    63→    defaultLocale
    64→  )
    65→}
    66→
    67→const shouldSkipIntl = (pathname: string) => {
    68→  return (
    69→    pathname.startsWith('/api') ||
    70→    pathname.startsWith('/dashboard') ||
    71→    pathname.startsWith('/_next') ||
    72→    pathname.startsWith('/_vercel') ||
    73→    pathname.startsWith('/feed') ||
    74→    pathname.startsWith('/sitemap') ||
    75→    pathname.startsWith('/home-og') ||
    76→    pathname === '/robots.txt' ||
    77→    pathname.includes('.')
    78→  )
    79→}
    80→
    81→export async function proxy(req: NextRequest) {
    82→  const { pathname, search } = req.nextUrl
    83→
    84→  let geo = geolocation(req)
    85→  const { headers } = req
    86→  let ip = ipAddress(req) ?? headers.get('x-real-ip')
    87→  const forwardedFor = headers.get('x-forwarded-for')
    88→  if (!ip && forwardedFor) {
    89→    ip = forwardedFor.split(',').at(0) ?? ''
    90→  }
    91→  const cfGeo = headers.get('cf-ipcountry')
    92→  if (cfGeo && !geo) {
    93→    geo = {
    94→      country: cfGeo,
    95→      city: headers.get('cf-ipcity') ?? '',
    96→      latitude: headers.get('cf-iplatitude') ?? '',
    97→      longitude: headers.get('cf-iplongitude') ?? '',
    98→      region: headers.get('cf-region') ?? '',
    99→    }
   100→  }
   101→
   102→  const requestHeaders = new Headers(req.headers)
   103→  requestHeaders.set(REQUEST_PATHNAME, pathname)
   104→  requestHeaders.set(REQUEST_QUERY, search)
   105→  requestHeaders.set(REQUEST_GEO, geo?.country || 'unknown')
   106→  requestHeaders.set(REQUEST_IP, ip || '')
   107→  requestHeaders.set(REQUEST_HOST, headers.get('host') || '')
   108→
   109→  const { searchParams } = req.nextUrl
   110→
   111→  if (searchParams.has('peek-to')) {
   112→    const peekTo = searchParams.get('peek-to')
   113→    if (peekTo) {
   114→      const clonedUrl = req.nextUrl.clone()
   115→      clonedUrl.pathname = peekTo
   116→      clonedUrl.searchParams.delete('peek-to')
   117→      return NextResponse.redirect(clonedUrl)
   118→    }
   119→  }
   120→
   121→  if (!shouldSkipIntl(pathname)) {
   122→    // Check for unsupported locale in path and redirect to default
   123→    const segments = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean)
   124→    const firstSegment = segments[0]
   125→    if (firstSegment && isUnsupportedLocale(firstSegment)) {
   126→      // Remove the unsupported locale prefix and redirect
   127→      const newPathname = `/${segments.slice(1).join('/')}`
   128→      const clonedUrl = req.nextUrl.clone()
   129→      clonedUrl.pathname = newPathname || '/'
   130→      return NextResponse.redirect(clonedUrl)
   131→    }
   132→
   133→    const intlResponse = intlMiddleware(req)
   134→    const intlLocale = normalizeLocale(
   135→      applyIntlRequestHeaders(requestHeaders, intlResponse.headers),
   136→    )
   137→
   138→    // Persist resolved locale for server-side fetching (e.g. as `x-lang`)
   139→    requestHeaders.set(
   140→      REQUEST_LOCALE,
   141→      intlLocale || getLocaleFromRequest(req, pathname),
   142→    )
   143→
   144→    // Handle redirects
   145→    if (
   146→      intlResponse.status === 307 ||
   147→      intlResponse.status === 308 ||
   148→      intlResponse.headers.get('location')
   149→    ) {
   150→      return intlResponse
   151→    }
   152→
   153→    // Handle rewrites (for as-needed mode with default locale)
   154→    const rewriteHeader = intlResponse.headers.get('x-middleware-rewrite')
   155→    if (rewriteHeader) {
   156→      const rewriteUrl = new URL(rewriteHeader)
   157→      const response = NextResponse.rewrite(rewriteUrl, {
   158→        request: {
   159→          headers: requestHeaders,
   160→        },
   161→      })
   162→      copyIntlResponseHeaders(response.headers, intlResponse.headers)
   163→      return response
   164→    }
   165→
   166→    const response = NextResponse.next({
   167→      request: {
   168→        headers: requestHeaders,
   169→      },
   170→    })
   171→    copyIntlResponseHeaders(response.headers, intlResponse.headers)
   172→    return response
   173→  }
   174→
   175→  // Routes that skip next-intl still benefit from having a stable locale header.
   176→  requestHeaders.set(REQUEST_LOCALE, getLocaleFromRequest(req, pathname))
   177→
   178→  return NextResponse.next({
   179→    request: {
   180→      headers: requestHeaders,
   181→    },
   182→  })
   183→}
   184→
   185→export const config = {
   186→  matcher: [
   187→    /*
   188→     * Match all request paths except for the ones starting with:
   189→     * - api (API routes)
   190→     * - _next/static (static files)
   191→     * - _next/image (image optimization files)
   192→     * - favicon.ico (favicon file)
   193→     */
   194→    '/((?!api|_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|sw.js).*)',
   195→  ],
   196→}
   197→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 11:39:00Z)**_

`proxy.ts:74` 将 `/sitemap` 加入 `shouldSkipIntl`，故 middleware 跳过 intl 处理，不会 rewrite 至 `/{locale}/sitemap`。然 route handler 在 `app/[locale]/sitemap/route.tsx`，需 `[locale]` 段。请求落空，未命中 handler。

从 `shouldSkipIntl` 中移除 `/sitemap` 即可，令 intl middleware 将其 rewrite 至 `/{defaultLocale}/sitemap`：

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 11:39:02Z)**_

</details></tool-use>

如此，访 `/sitemap` 时 intl middleware 将内部 rewrite 至 `/{defaultLocale}/sitemap`，命中 route handler。外部 URL 仍为 `/sitemap` 不变。

移出 `[locale]`，移除 `params` 依赖，`locale` 不再需要：

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-15 11:39:35Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import { locales } from '~/i18n/config'
import { escapeXml } from '~/lib/helper.server'
import { getQueryClient } from '~/lib/query-client.server'
import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
import {
  buildLocalePrefixedPath,
  HREFLANG_BY_LOCALE,
  stripLocaleFromPathname,
} from '~/lib/seo/hreflang'

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
export const revalidate = 3600 // 1 hour
export const GET = async () => {
  const queryClient = getQueryClient()

  const { data } = await queryClient.fetchQuery({
    queryKey: ['sitemap'],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const path = apiClient.aggregate.proxy.sitemap.toString(true)
      return fetch(path).then((res) => res.json())
    },
  })

  const buildAlternateLinksForPostOrNote = (rawUrl: string) => {
    let url: URL
    try {
      url = new URL(rawUrl)
    } catch {
      return ''
    }

    const basePath = stripLocaleFromPathname(url.pathname)
    const parts = basePath.split('/').filter(Boolean)
    const isPost = parts[0] === 'posts' && parts.length >= 3
    const isNote = parts[0] === 'notes' && parts.length >= 2
    if (!isPost && !isNote) return ''

    const { origin } = url

    const links = locales
      .map((loc) => {
        const hrefLang = HREFLANG_BY_LOCALE[loc]
        const href = `${origin}${buildLocalePrefixedPath(loc, basePath)}`
        return `  <xhtml:link rel="alternate" hreflang="${escapeXml(
          hrefLang,
        )}" href="${escapeXml(href)}" />`
      })
      .join('\n')

    const xDefaultHref = `${origin}${basePath}`
    const xDefault = `  <xhtml:link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="${escapeXml(
      xDefaultHref,
    )}" />`

    return `${links}\n${xDefault}`
  }

  const xml = `
  <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
  <urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9" xmlns:news="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-news/0.9" xmlns:xhtml="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:image="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-image/1.1" xmlns:video="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-video/1.1">
  ${data
    .map((item: any) => {
      const loc = escapeXml(String(item.url ?? ''))
      const lastmod = item.published_at
        ? escapeXml(String(item.published_at))
        : ''
      const alternates = item.url
        ? buildAlternateLinksForPostOrNote(String(item.url))
        : ''

      return `<url>
  <loc>${loc}</loc>
${lastmod ? `  <lastmod>${lastmod}</lastmod>` : ''}
  <changefreq>daily</changefreq>
${alternates ? `${alternates}\n` : ''}</url>`
    })
    .join('')}
  </urlset>
  `.trim()
  return new Response(xml, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/xml',
    },
  })
}

```
